# NaCl (Claude Code plugin)

Version 2.23.0. NaCl's BA/SA/TL spec-graph methodology, packaged as a Claude Code Desktop plugin.

## Install

```
/plugin marketplace add ITSalt/NaCl
/plugin install nacl@nacl
```

## Do not double-install

Do not install this plugin in a checkout that also has the repo-side symlinked skills
(`~/.claude/skills/nacl-*`) active — pick one channel. A SessionStart hook warns if both
are detected.

## Excluded skills

| Source dir | Reason |
| --- | --- |
| `nacl-core` | shared library — shipped whole at plugin root (nacl-core/), not as an invocable skill |
| `nacl-goal` | wraps the /goal command — CLI-only; Desktop cannot run it |
| `nacl-postmortem` | RARE/high-stakes; workflow panel lives repo-side |
| `nacl-migrate` | rare; requires Python + repo checkout |
| `nacl-migrate-ba` | rare; requires Python + repo checkout |
| `nacl-migrate-sa` | rare; requires Python + repo checkout |

## Neo4j MCP server

The project graph's MCP server is configured per-project (via `/nacl:init`), not by this
plugin — the plugin ships the skills, not project infrastructure.
